title: Rerremen Fermented Plant-Based Burger
description: A unique, plant-based burger featuring fermented flavors and a rich, dutch-styled twist.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet or grill over medium heat.
2. In a large bowl, mash the rerremen with a fork until it's mostly smooth.
3. Add the fermented plant-based milk, cocoa powder, nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper to the bowl. Mix well.
4. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the bowl and mix until combined.
5. Using your hands, shape the mixture into 4-6 patties, depending on desired size.
6. Brush the patties with olive oil and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
7. Meanwhile, toast the breadcrumbs in a dry skillet over medium heat until lightly browned.
8. Assemble the burgers by placing a cooked patty on a toasted bun and topping with toasted breadcrumbs.
